---
title: "Machine Learning"
---

## What is Machine Learning?

<!-- TODO: define ML vs. traditional programming -->

## Machine Learning vs. Statistical Learning

Différence entre machine learning et statistical learning.

<!-- TODO: expand on the philosophical and practical differences -->

## Supervised Learning

<!-- TODO: regression, classification, common algorithms -->

## Unsupervised Learning

<!-- TODO: clustering, dimensionality reduction -->

## Model Evaluation

- [Cross-Validation](cross-validation.qmd) — resampling strategies for robust evaluation

## Key Concepts

<!-- TODO: bias-variance tradeoff, overfitting/underfitting, feature engineering -->
